top_signals.title: Gold price loses its grip: World’s 50 biggest mining companies shed $228 billion in Q2
top_signals.summary: Gold's slide back below $4,000 an ounce wipes out most of mining's 2026 gains, but the diversified giants – led by a resurgent BHP – is staging a comeback.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Helsing raises $1.8 billion in Europe’s biggest defense-startup round
top_signals.summary: Defense technology has been one of the fastest-growing areas of venture capital funding on the back of rising military budgets, and in Europe especially.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
